lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What was God’s command to Saul about the Amalekites?
How did Saul disobey God’s command?
answers: He spared the king and kept the best animals
He teamed up with the Amalekites

questions.text: What did Samuel say is more important than sacrifices?
What was Saul’s consequence for disobeying God?
answers: His kingdom would be taken away

questions.text: What did Saul do as Samuel tried to leave?
answers: He grabbed Samuel’s robe and tore it
He sent his soldiers to capture Samuel
He asked God to forgive me

questions.text: Why did God send Samuel to Jesse’s house?
answers: To collect money for the Tabernacle

questions.text: What did God tell Samuel about Jesse’s sons?
answers: Do not look at outside – God looks at the heart

questions.text: What did God say about Jesse’s first seven sons?

answers: Out taking care of the sheep

questions.text: What was the name of the son Samuel anointed as king?
